business.name: ProClean Organizers
business.serviceAreaSummary: Serving Manhattan, Queens, and select areas of the Bronx and Brooklyn. Available across Westchester, Long Island, Northern New Jersey, and Connecticut.

mission: At ProClean Organizers, we believe that order creates strength. We transform cluttered spaces into clean, functional environments that give our clients more time, less stress, and lasting peace of mind. Tidy is Mighty.

methodSteps.name: Assess
methodSteps.description: Evaluate the space, identify challenges, and determine goals.

methodSteps.name: Clean
methodSteps.description: Remove dust, dirt, stains, and environmental clutter to create a fresh foundation.

methodSteps.name: Declutter
methodSteps.description: Identify items no longer needed for donation, recycling, sale, or disposal.

methodSteps.name: Consolidate
methodSteps.description: Gather similar items to eliminate duplication.

methodSteps.name: Categorize
methodSteps.description: Group belongings by function and frequency of use.

methodSteps.name: Organize
methodSteps.description: Build customized systems for efficiency and accessibility.

methodSteps.name: Label
methodSteps.description: Clearly identify storage locations and zones.

methodSteps.name: Maintain
methodSteps.description: Provide guidance to sustain the organized environment.

methodSteps.name: Follow Up
methodSteps.description: Optional visits to evaluate effectiveness and adjust over time.

services.name: Bedroom Organization
services.description: Organizing clothing, furniture, personal items, and storage to create a peaceful, functional bedroom.

services.name: Closet Organization
services.description: Sorting, decluttering, categorizing, folding, hanging, and maximizing closet space.

services.name: Kitchen Organization
services.description: Organizing cabinets, drawers, countertops, cookware, food storage, and workflow.

services.name: Pantry Organization
services.description: Sorting food items, creating zones, labeling categories, and improving accessibility.

services.name: Bathroom Organization
services.description: Organizing toiletries, medications, linens, and storage while reducing clutter.

services.name: Living Room Organization
services.description: Decluttering, furniture arrangement, and organization systems for functional living spaces.

services.name: Home Office Organization
services.description: Organizing workspaces, supplies, files, and workflow systems.

services.name: Garage Organization
services.description: Creating storage zones for tools, equipment, seasonal items, and household supplies.

services.name: Basement and Storage Area Organization
services.description: Sorting, consolidating, and organizing long-term storage areas.

services.name: Space Planning Consultation
services.description: Evaluating current use of a space and designing systems for efficiency and accessibility.

services.name: Room Layout Optimization
services.description: Rearranging furniture and organizing spaces to improve flow and comfort.

services.name: General Decluttering
services.description: Identifying unnecessary items and building systems to reduce clutter long-term.

services.name: Downsizing Assistance
services.description: Helping clients reduce possessions during moves or lifestyle changes.

services.name: Estate Consolidation and Organization
services.description: Assisting families with organizing and consolidating belongings during estate transitions.

services.name: Move Preparation
services.description: Decluttering and organizing prior to a move.

services.name: Packing Assistance
services.description: Organizing and packing belongings systematically.

services.name: Unpacking and Home Setup
services.description: Establishing organized systems after a move.

services.name: Paper Management
services.description: Sorting and creating filing systems for personal and business documents.

services.name: Photo and Memorabilia Organization
services.description: Sorting, categorizing, and preserving photos and sentimental items.

services.name: Digital Organization
services.description: Organizing electronic files, folders, and digital records.

services.name: Time Management and Productivity Systems
services.description: Building routines and systems that improve productivity.

services.name: Hoarding and Chronic Disorganization Support
services.description: Compassionate, judgment free, sustainable progress at the client's pace.

services.name: Senior Organizing Services
services.description: Helping older adults simplify living spaces and maintain safe, accessible environments.

services.name: Deep Cleaning and Organizing Preparation
services.description: Removing dust, dirt, stains, and debris before organizing begins; cleanliness is the foundation of the method.

services.name: Donation Coordination
services.description: Sorting and preparing items for donation.

services.name: Donation Drop-Off Service
services.description: Transporting approved items to local donation centers.

services.name: Recycling Coordination
services.description: Identifying recyclable items and coordinating disposal.

services.name: Paper Shredding and Special Disposal Coordination
services.description: Assistance with sensitive documents, electronics, and household materials through community disposal events.

services.name: Online Marketplace Listing Assistance
services.description: Photographing, listing, and preparing items for sale online.

services.name: Furniture Rearrangement
services.description: Improving room functionality through layout adjustments.

services.name: Labeling Systems
services.description: Customized labels and identification systems.

services.name: Cable Management
services.description: Organizing and concealing wires for safety and appearance.

services.name: Entryway Drop Zone Creation
services.description: Dedicated space for keys, mail, bags, and daily essentials.

services.name: Light Painting and Minor Home Improvements
services.description: Basic painting, shelving installation, and organizational enhancements.

services.name: Organizing System Evaluation
services.description: Scheduled visits at 3, 6, or 9 months to assess systems and adjust as needed.

packages.name: The Mighty Reset
packages.summary: A single organizing project: closet, pantry, home office, bedroom, or similar.

packages.name: The Mighty Room Transformation
packages.summary: Complete transformation of a larger room or multiple smaller spaces.

packages.name: The Mighty Home Refresh
packages.summary: Multiple rooms or larger home organization projects.

packages.name: The Mighty Lifestyle Transformation
packages.summary: Comprehensive support for major life transitions.
includes: Ongoing support and follow up recommendations

packages.name: The Mighty Move Package
packages.summary: For clients moving or settling into a new home.

packages.name: The Mighty Senior Support Package
packages.summary: For seniors and families assisting loved ones through transitions.

portfolioProjects.title: Bedroom Reset
portfolioProjects.notes: Cleared the bed of bags and laundry, sorted and rehung the closet by category, and defined a clean floor line with a runner for daily walking room.

portfolioProjects.title: Dresser & Storage
portfolioProjects.notes: Emptied and re-folded each drawer, consolidated stacked baskets into a considered display, and cleared the top surface so it reads as a finished vignette.

portfolioProjects.title: Home Office Corner
portfolioProjects.notes: Tamed cable clutter, cleared the desktop to essentials only, and turned the adjacent shelf into a working display of books, plants, and objects.
